## Human accountability checklist

<!-- These are your responsibility. The CI gate checks some of these
     automatically, but the judgment is yours. -->

- [ ] Every behavior change has a corresponding requirement record
- [ ] Every new requirement traces to a job
- [ ] Decisions about what was explicitly excluded are recorded as decision records
- [ ] If an existing approved requirement was modified, the change is intentional and understood
- [ ] If this PR supersedes a previous requirement, the old record is marked superseded
